-- Code Generated by Sidekick is for learning and experimentation purposes only.
/*
Example "long" SQL query (PostgreSQL) for an e-commerce analytics use case.

Assumed tables:
- orders(order_id, customer_id, order_date, status, channel, currency)
- order_items(order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, unit_cost, discount_amount)
- customers(customer_id, email, created_at, country, state)
- products(product_id, category, brand, is_active)
- fx_rates(rate_date, from_currency, to_currency, rate)
*/

WITH
params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE '2025-01-01' AS start_date,
    DATE '2025-12-31' AS end_date,
    'USD'::text       AS reporting_ccy
),
filtered_orders AS (
  SELECT
    o.order_id,
    o.customer_id,
    o.order_date::date AS order_date,
    o.status,
    o.channel,
    o.currency
  FROM orders o
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE o.order_date::date BETWEEN p.start_date AND p.end_date
    AND o.status IN ('PAID','SHIPPED','COMPLETED')
),
order_lines AS (
  SELECT
    oi.order_id,
    oi.product_id,
    oi.quantity,
    oi.unit_price,
    oi.unit_cost,
    COALESCE(oi.discount_amount, 0) AS discount_amount,
    (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - COALESCE(oi.discount_amount, 0) AS net_revenue_native,
    (oi.quantity * oi.unit_cost) AS cogs_native
  FROM order_items oi
),
order_fx AS (
  SELECT
    fo.order_id,
    fo.order_date,
    fo.currency,
    p.reporting_ccy,
    COALESCE(fr.rate, 1.0) AS fx_rate_to_reporting
  FROM filtered_orders fo
  CROSS JOIN params p
  LEFT JOIN fx_rates fr
    ON fr.rate_date = fo.order_date
   AND fr.from_currency = fo.currency
   AND fr.to_currency = p.reporting_ccy
),
enriched_lines AS (
  SELECT
    fo.order_id,
    fo.customer_id,
    fo.order_date,
    fo.channel,
    fo.currency,
    ofx.reporting_ccy,
    ofx.fx_rate_to_reporting,

    ol.product_id,
    ol.quantity,

    -- Convert to reporting currency
    (ol.net_revenue_native * ofx.fx_rate_to_reporting) AS net_revenue_reporting,
    (ol.cogs_native * ofx.fx_rate_to_reporting)        AS cogs_reporting
  FROM filtered_orders fo
  JOIN order_lines ol
    ON ol.order_id = fo.order_id
  JOIN order_fx ofx
    ON ofx.order_id = fo.order_id
),
product_dim AS (
  SELECT
    p.product_id,
    p.category,
    p.brand
  FROM products p
  WHERE p.is_active = TRUE
),
customer_dim AS (
  SELECT
    c.customer_id,
    c.created_at::date AS customer_created_date,
    c.country,
    c.state
  FROM customers c
),
facts AS (
  SELECT
    el.order_id,
    el.customer_id,
    el.order_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', el.order_date)::date AS order_month,
    el.channel,

    cd.country,
    cd.state,
    cd.customer_created_date,

    pd.category,
    pd.brand,

    el.quantity,
    el.net_revenue_reporting,
    el.cogs_reporting,
    (el.net_revenue_reporting - el.cogs_reporting) AS gross_profit_reporting
  FROM enriched_lines el
  LEFT JOIN product_dim pd ON pd.product_id = el.product_id
  LEFT JOIN customer_dim cd ON cd.customer_id = el.customer_id
),
customer_rfm AS (
  SELECT
    f.customer_id,
    MAX(f.order_date) AS last_order_date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.order_id) AS orders_count,
    SUM(f.net_revenue_reporting) AS revenue_reporting
  FROM facts f
  GROUP BY f.customer_id
),
customer_rfm_scored AS (
  SELECT
    r.*,
    -- Basic RFM scoring via percentile buckets (4 = best)
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY r.last_order_date DESC) AS recency_score,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY r.orders_count DESC)    AS frequency_score,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY r.revenue_reporting DESC) AS monetary_score
  FROM customer_rfm r
),
segmented_facts AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    cr.recency_score,
    cr.frequency_score,
    cr.monetary_score,
    CASE
      WHEN cr.recency_score = 4 AND cr.frequency_score >= 3 AND cr.monetary_score >= 3 THEN 'Champions'
      WHEN cr.recency_score >= 3 AND cr.frequency_score >= 3 THEN 'Loyal'
      WHEN cr.recency_score = 4 AND cr.frequency_score <= 2 THEN 'New'
      WHEN cr.recency_score <= 2 AND cr.frequency_score >= 3 THEN 'At Risk'
      ELSE 'Others'
    END AS rfm_segment,
    CASE
      WHEN f.customer_created_date >= (f.order_date - INTERVAL '30 days') THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS is_new_customer_on_order
  FROM facts f
  LEFT JOIN customer_rfm_scored cr
    ON cr.customer_id = f.customer_id
),
monthly_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    f.order_month,
    f.reporting_ccy,
    f.channel,
    f.country,
    f.state,
    f.category,
    f.brand,
    f.rfm_segment,

    COUNT(DISTINCT f.order_id) AS orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.customer_id) AS customers,
    SUM(f.quantity) AS units,

    ROUND(SUM(f.net_revenue_reporting)::numeric, 2) AS revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(f.cogs_reporting)::numeric, 2) AS cogs,
    ROUND(SUM(f.gross_profit_reporting)::numeric, 2) AS gross_profit,

    ROUND(
      CASE WHEN SUM(f.net_revenue_reporting) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE (SUM(f.gross_profit_reporting) / SUM(f.net_revenue_reporting)) * 100
      END
    , 2) AS gross_margin_pct,

    SUM(f.is_new_customer_on_order) AS new_customer_orders
  FROM segmented_facts f
  GROUP BY
    f.order_month, f.reporting_ccy, f.channel, f.country, f.state, f.category, f.brand, f.rfm_segment
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    mr.*,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY mr.order_month ORDER BY mr.revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank_in_month
  FROM monthly_rollup mr
)
SELECT
  order_month,
  reporting_ccy,
  channel,
  country,
  state,
  category,
  brand,
  rfm_segment,
  orders,
  customers,
  units,
  revenue,
  cogs,
  gross_profit,
  gross_margin_pct,
  new_customer_orders,
  revenue_rank_in_month
FROM ranked
WHERE revenue_rank_in_month <= 25
ORDER BY order_month DESC, revenue_rank_in_month ASC, revenue DESC;
